name: Japan Industrial Production (METI Indices of Industrial Production)
notes: T2 fallback for FRED JPNPROINDMISMEI (frozen 2024-03). 2026-06-15 fix: the previously-registered statsDataId 0003446463 was NOT the IIP table — getMetaInfo shows it is the Cabinet Office Composite Index of Business Conditions (景気動向指数; stat 00100406; tab=Contributions only). Re-pointed to METI 鉱工業生産・出荷・在庫指数 (stat 00550300) live 2020-base table 0004052177 = 業種別季節調整済指数【月次】付加価値額生産. Slice cdCat01=0001000 (業種別_2020 鉱工業 = Mining & Manufacturing total; SA production index; 2020=100); lang=J required (table absent from the English DB; lang=J passed via the series_id query string overrides fetch_series' default lang=E). Verified 2026-06-15: monthly (median_gap≈31); last obs 2026-03 vs FRED stuck 2024-03. freshness_override_days=60: the DB time-series table carries finals through ~T-3 months (newer 速報 months are file-only), so the latest obs runs ~90-120d old between monthly refreshes; 60 keeps it in STALE rather than EXPIRED, matching the sibling JPN_MACH_ORDERS override.

name: Japan Machinery Orders (Cabinet Office Orders Received for Machinery — private sector ex volatile)
notes: §3.1.3 Growth axis extension. 2026-06-15 fix: the previously-registered statsDataId 0003355224 was the ANNUAL fiscal-year Original-Series table (no monthly / no SA) — getMetaInfo: cat02=系列 offered only OriginalSeries and time=Fiscal year, so it resolved a stale annual slice. Re-pointed to the monthly SA sibling 0003355222 = 長期系列 主要需要者別機械受注額(原系列・季調系列、月次), Cabinet Office Machinery Orders (stat 00100401). Slice cdCat01=160 (需要者分類 民間需要(船舶・電力を除く) = private-sector excl. ships & electric power) + cdCat02=100 (系列 季調系列 = seasonally adjusted). Verified 2026-06-15: monthly (median_gap≈31); last obs 2026-03 vs the old annual slice stuck 2025-10.

name: Japan Retail Sales Total (METI Current Survey of Commerce — Commercial Sales)
notes: §3.1.3 Growth axis extension 2026-06-10. METI Current Survey of Commerce (商業動態統計) — 第5部指数 業種別商業販売額指数, SA monthly. e-Stat catalogue: toukei 00550030, statsDataId 0003138782 (replaces the wrong 0003285601 that errored "does not exist" on the 2026-06-11 11:52 UTC run). Catalogue URL https://www.e-stat.go.jp/stat-search/database?stat_infid=000031390838&layout=dataset&statdisp_id=0003138782. Retail (小売業) is selectable via cdCat; revisit on first credentialed fetch. 2026-06-11 follow-up note: a second discovery pass flagged the possibility that 0003138782 is the 平成25年（2013）年報 archive rather than the live monthly headline — the METI live headline may live in stat-search/files (stat_infid=000040274818) only, not the DB API. Verify on first credentialed CI run by checking last_obs: if 2013-ish, switch to file-download; if 2026-ish, keep as is.

name: Japan Household Real Expenditure (MIC Family Income and Expenditure Survey — two-or-more-person households)
notes: §3.1.3 Growth axis extension 2026-06-10. MIC Family Income and Expenditure Survey (家計調査) — 用途分類 001 用途分類（総数）全国, monthly two-or-more-person households. e-Stat catalogue: toukei 00200561, statsDataId 0002070001 (2026-06-15 fix: replaces 0003000807 which also errored "does not exist" on the 2026-06-15 daily run; 0003000807 in turn had replaced the original 0002070010). Catalogue URL https://www.e-stat.go.jp/dbview?sid=0002070001 — title "家計調査 家計収支編 二人以上の世帯用途分類 001 用途分類（総数）", monthly 1985-01→present. Dimensions: 表章項目, 用途分類 (265 codes — 消費支出 is the headline), 世帯区分 (4 — pick 二人以上の世帯), 地域区分 (75 — pick 全国). cdCat filter discovery pending first credentialed fetch.

name: Japan Economy Watchers Survey — Current Conditions DI (Cabinet Office)
notes: §3.1.3 Growth axis extension 2026-06-10. Cabinet Office Economy Watchers Survey (景気ウォッチャー調査) — 回答者数・構成比及びDIの推移 景気の現状判断と先行き判断, raw (unadjusted) national table; the SA national headline is published only as Excel via stat-search/files and is not exposed as a getStatsData database table. e-Stat catalogue: toukei 00100001, tstat 000001012172, statsDataId 0003348427 (2026-06-15 fix: replaces 0003348423 which errored "does not exist" on the 2026-06-15 daily run; 0003348424 is the SA regional version; 0003348426 is the raw regional version; original PROVISIONAL 0003065691 also errored 2026-06-11). Dimensions: 表章項目 (DI), 判断 (合計/上昇/低下), 景気の方向性及び水準 (pick 景気の現状判断（方向性）), 分野 (pick 合計), 地域 (pick 全国). Catalogue URL https://www.e-stat.go.jp/dbview?sid=0003348427.
